name: proxmox-mcp
description: Minimal MCP server for Proxmox VE: 38 tools for nodes, QEMU VMs, LXC containers, storage, cluster, and snapshots.
long_description: A deliberately minimal MCP server for managing Proxmox VE clusters. Exposes 38 tools covering nodes, QEMU VMs, LXC containers, storage, cluster operations, and snapshots. Read-only by default; lifecycle operations (start/stop/clone/snapshot) and destructive operations (delete/rollback) are gated behind explicit risk levels. Built with FastMCP and the official Proxmoxer client.

proxmox_host.title: Proxmox Host
proxmox_host.description: IP address or hostname of your Proxmox VE server.

proxmox_user.title: Proxmox User
proxmox_user.description: Proxmox username with realm, e.g. root@pam.

proxmox_token_name.title: API Token Name
proxmox_token_name.description: Proxmox API token ID. Create one in Datacenter > Permissions > API Tokens.

proxmox_token_value.title: API Token Value
proxmox_token_value.description: Secret value of the Proxmox API token. Stored securely; never logged.

proxmox_verify_ssl.title: Verify SSL
proxmox_verify_ssl.description: Set to 'true' to verify TLS certificates. Use 'false' for self-signed homelab certificates.

proxmox_risk_level.title: Risk Level
proxmox_risk_level.description: Tool access tier: 'read' = read-only (default), 'lifecycle' = + start/stop/reboot/clone/create-snapshot, 'all' = + delete/rollback snapshots.
